title: [FIRRTL] Add domain create op
body:
Add a `firrtl.domain.create` operation.  This is used to "instantiate" a
domain, similar to a FIRRTL module or class.  This specifically comes up
when needing to model the situation where a domain is _created_, e.g., in
a clock gate or clock mux.

This works towards fixing a large problem with the current domain modeling
where InferDomains will, naturally, infer an input domain for an output
domain.  We don't want this behavior and need to create a domain so that
it doesn't do this.

This PR is structured into four logical commits that may be reviewed
independently:

  1. Add the operation
  2. Add FIRRTL test parsing
  3. Add FIRRTL emission
  4. Add handling to InferDomains to drop this in "strip" mode
